name: Your Name
title: Backend / Distributed Systems Engineer
about:
I'm a backend engineer who spends most of my time thinking about distributed systems, data consistency, and why things break at 3 AM.

I believe good infrastructure is invisible — when it works, nobody notices; when it doesn't, everybody panics. My job is to keep everybody calm.

When I'm not debugging race conditions, you can find me reading papers, contributing to open source, or pretending I understand frontend.
